name: pagination
visual_summary: The pagination component is a widget used to navigate through a series of pages. It consists of a navigation menu with buttons for previous, next, first, and last pages. Typically, pagination is used when there are a large number of items to display, making it easier for users to traverse the content.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready pagination component with the following characteristics:

Name: pagination
Description: The pagination component is a widget used to navigate through a series of pages. It consists of a navigation menu with buttons for previous, next, first, and last pages. Typically, pagination is used when there are a large number of items to display, making it easier for users to traverse the content.
Style: flat, bordered, rounded
Interactions: clickable, hover, scroll
Tags: navigation, pagination, scrolling

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
